data.name: Lust 'n Dead 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Destroy enemy waves one after another using an extensive range of weapons as you attempt to save the town from invasion! Improve your arsenal, level up, find the cure and witness some hot adult action! 🔞

Welcome to Lust 'n Dead 🔞, a shooter where you’ll play as Agent K69, a.k.a. Kate - a retired special forces agent being asked to save the day once more. You’ll be sent directly to the center of the zombie virus outbreak since it’s the place where zero patient should be - and he’s the only chance to save everyone!

Face various types of zombie waves - varying enemies and challenges to overcome await. From basic hordes to migration and invasion waves - every encounter will test your skills and strategy as you face poisonous, invisible, explosive and gigantic zombies attacking you!

Use a wide arsenal - basic melee weapons, pistols, rifles - from a knife to a bat, from a basic pistol to a shotgun, from a sniper rifle to a tommy gun - find what suits your playstyle and make the most out of it. Gain money, level up, build your character as you like, buy new guns, upgrade them, and try to survive crowds of foes!

Given that before being asked to help with the virus, Kate worked in the adult movie industry - she definitely enjoys putting cake in the oven, and although such an aspect of life is often overlooked in such games/movies - it’s not the case here😉. Get ready for unhinged 18+ fun!

Features:
  • Hot 🔞 scenes - experience every aspect of the characters while finding pleasure in a good amount of lustful adult scenes!
  • Wave-based shooter - hair-rising gameplay wrapped around all sorts of action that will challenge your skills!
  • Various weapons - a diverse collection of firearms and melee instruments to wipe out waves of undead.
  • Immersive world - events are unfolding in an abandoned urban setting, where each corner hides something intriguing.
  • Top-notch graphics - attentively crafted 3D visuals both in the adult scenes and in the gameplay.
  • Character progression - purchase and upgrade weapons, level up and make them regret even trying to attack you!
  • Join the fight and embrace the chaos!

data.short_description: Destroy enemy waves one after another using an extensive range of weapons as you attempt to save the town from invasion! Improve your arsenal, level up, find the cure and witness some hot adult action! 🔞
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
